MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-27-2026 Continued To Jul-13-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Apr-06-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication.

Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.'s unopposed Motion for Summary Judgment or Summary Adjudication is GRANTED.

Plaintiff's unopposed request for judicial notice is granted. (See Evidence Code section 452(d).)

(see word minutes for full details)

Counsel for the Plaintiff is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard paper copy in Dept. 302's inbox.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
